journey_type_reason: 所有改动仅在 packages/brain/scripts/ + sprints/ + 报告文档，验证目标全部是 Brain 内部调度链路 invariant；不涉及 dashboard / remote agent / dev pipeline hooks

tasks.title: 整合 smoke 骨架 + happy path (Steps 1-3)
tasks.scope: 创建 packages/brain/scripts/smoke/walking-skeleton-p1-acceptance-smoke.sh：含 shebang + set -euo pipefail + brain/pg 顶部可用性检测（不可用 SKIP exit 0）+ psql/curl helpers + assert helpers + test-w29- 前缀隔离清理 + Steps 1-3（投 task、POST /api/brain/tick、断言 dispatch_events 带 5 分钟时间窗口 + /api/brain/dispatch/recent shape 严等 {events,limit,total} + event_type ∈ {dispatched,failed_dispatch} + slot in_progress +1、SQL 模拟 reportNode 写回 + task_events 'task_completed'、断言 tasks.status='completed' updated_at 1 分钟内）。每段所有 assertion 真过后必须 echo 合同契约定义的分段 PASS 字面标记。What 为主，不展开实现细节
dod: [ARTIFACT] packages/brain/scripts/smoke/walking-skeleton-p1-acceptance-smoke.sh 存在且可执行
[ARTIFACT] 文件顶部 #!/usr/bin/env bash + set -euo pipefail
[ARTIFACT] 顶部含 test-w29- 隔离前缀 + SKIP 退路探测
[BEHAVIOR ws1-skip-or-run] smoke 要么 SKIP exit 0 要么真打印整体 PASS 标记
[BEHAVIOR ws1-b1-reportnode-writeback] echo '[B1] PASS — reportNode 写回 tasks.status=completed' 前完成真 SQL 断言
[BEHAVIOR ws1-b3-slot-in] echo '[B3-IN] PASS — slot in_progress +1' 前完成真断言
[BEHAVIOR ws1-b6-table-write] echo '[B6-TABLE] PASS — dispatch_events +N 行 within 5min' 前完成真 SQL 时间窗口断言
[BEHAVIOR ws1-b6-endpoint-shape] echo '[B6-EP] PASS — /dispatch/recent shape={events,limit,total} no_banned_keys=ok' 前完成 jq -e 严 shape 断言（含禁用字段反向）
[BEHAVIOR ws1-b6-event-type-enum] echo '[B6-ENUM] PASS — event_type ∈ {dispatched,failed_dispatch}' 前完成枚举断言

tasks.title: HOL skip + zombie reaper 段 (Steps 4-5)
tasks.scope: 在 WS1 的 smoke 文件追加 Step 4（HOL skip：复用 dispatcher-hol-skip-smoke.sh 已验代码路径，通过填满 codex pool 让 task_A 触发 dispatcher.js:407 HOL skip 分支；同时投 task_B/C 可派发；POST /api/brain/tick；断言 task_A 的 claimed_by 被释放、task_B 或 task_C 5 分钟时间窗口内 dispatch_events 含 event_type='dispatched'、dispatcher 真日志含字面值 'HOL skip' 字串）+ Step 5（zombie reaper：构造 test-w29-zombie status='in_progress' updated_at NOW()-30min；node import('./packages/brain/src/zombie-reaper.js') 调 reapZombies({ idleMinutes: 0 })；断言返回 reaped≥1 errors=0、tasks.status='failed' + error_message 含字面子串 '[reaper] zombie' + completed_at 非空、slot in_progress -1）。每段 echo 合同契约定义的分段 PASS 标记
dod: [ARTIFACT] smoke 文件含 test-w29-hol-A/B/C 投递与 codex pool 满构造
[ARTIFACT] smoke 文件含 test-w29-zombie + reapZombies({idleMinutes:0}) 调用
[ARTIFACT] smoke 含字面值 '[reaper] zombie' 子串
[BEHAVIOR ws2-b5-hol-task-a-claim-released] echo '[B5-A] PASS — task_A claimed_by 被释放' 前完成真 SQL 断言
[BEHAVIOR ws2-b5-task-bc-dispatched] echo '[B5-BC] PASS — dispatch_events 含 task_B|C event_type=dispatched within 5min' 前完成真断言
[BEHAVIOR ws2-b5-dispatcher-log] echo "[B5-LOG] PASS — dispatcher 真日志含 'HOL skip'" 前 grep brain 真日志
[BEHAVIOR ws2-b2-zombie-reaped-failed] echo "[B2] PASS — reapZombies 标 task=failed error_message='[reaper] zombie ...'" 前完成真 SQL 断言
[BEHAVIOR ws2-b2-reaper-return-shape] echo '[B2-RET] PASS — reapZombies returned reaped=N errors=0' 前完成返回值 shape 断言
[BEHAVIOR ws2-b3-slot-out] echo '[B3-OUT] PASS — slot in_progress -1 after zombie reaped' 前完成真断言

tasks.title: guidance TTL + heartbeat + 出口 PASS (Steps 6-8)
tasks.scope: smoke 追加 Step 6（B4：INSERT brain_guidance key='strategy:global' value->decision_id='stale-w29-test' updated_at=NOW()-30min；node import('./packages/brain/src/guidance.js') 调 getGuidance('strategy:global') 断言返回 null；brain stdout 含 guidance.js:48-49 真日志字面值 'strategy decision stale'）+ Step 7（B7：node import('./packages/brain/src/fleet-resource-cache.js')，startFleetRefresh 等 2s 后 getFleetStatus；断言每条 entry 含 offline_reason + last_ping_at 字段、offline_reason 取值严等 ∈ {null, 'fetch_failed', 'no_ping_grace_exceeded'} 三个字面值之一；stopFleetRefresh 清理）+ Step 8（出口：trap EXIT 清理 test-w29- 全部测试数据；echo '[walking-skeleton-p1-终验] PASS — 7 项 P1 修复全链路联调通过'；脚本整体 exit 0）。每段 echo 合同契约定义的分段 PASS 标记
dod: [ARTIFACT] smoke 含 brain_guidance INSERT + decision_id + INTERVAL '30 minutes' + getGuidance 调用
[ARTIFACT] smoke 含 fleet-resource-cache + startFleetRefresh + getFleetStatus + 三个枚举字面值
[ARTIFACT] smoke 末尾含字面值 '[walking-skeleton-p1-终验] PASS — 7 项 P1 修复全链路联调通过'
[ARTIFACT] smoke 含 trap EXIT + DELETE test-w29- 清理
[BEHAVIOR ws3-b4-stale-returns-null] echo '[B4] PASS — getGuidance returned null for stale decision_id' 前完成真断言
[BEHAVIOR ws3-b4-guidance-log] echo "[B4-LOG] PASS — guidance.js 真日志含 'strategy decision stale'" 前完成 brain stdout grep
[BEHAVIOR ws3-b7-shape] echo '[B7-SHAPE] PASS — fleet entries 含 offline_reason + last_ping_at' 前完成真断言
[BEHAVIOR ws3-b7-enum] echo '[B7-ENUM] PASS — offline_reason ∈ {null,fetch_failed,no_ping_grace_exceeded}' 前完成枚举断言
[BEHAVIOR ws3-overall-pass] 末尾 echo 整体 PASS 字面值（前置任意 set -e fail 都达不到此 echo）
[BEHAVIOR ws3-overall-exit-zero] 整脚本 bash 调用后 exit code = 0（要么 SKIP 退路要么真过）
